6727fb420a73c65be67f770d.question: A building in this city features a glass façade with 4,500 LEDs whose phallic shape is meant to represent an erupting geyser, according to its architect, Jean Nouvel. The curved roof of one building in this city that may represent a dragon’s back was decorated using the (*) trencadís (“trun-ka-THESE”) technique, which was also used for a park entrance’s colorful mosaic salamander. Eighteen spires and Nativity, Passion, and Glory façades are part of a religious building in this city that is set to be completed in 2026. 6727fb420a73c65be67f770d.answer: Barcelona (the unnamed Nouvel building is the Torré Glòries)
